title: TrafficVis
description: A suite of interactive simulations designed for teaching the fundamental basics of transportation engineering, such as cumulative plots and traffic equilibrium.

title: GTFS Segments
description: A Python library developed to analyze bus stop spacings using General Transit Feed Specification (GTFS) data, widely used by transit agencies.

title: Ride-hailing Economics
description: Ongoing studies on the taxation and market dynamics of ride-hailing services, including case studies of NYC.

title: Multi-modal Traffic Stability
description: Research focusing on the physics and economics of urban traffic using tools like the Macroscopic Fundamental Diagram (MFD).
